action.description: Read third time in full – FAILED - 15-19-1AYES – Anthon, Cook, Den Hartog, Foreman, Grow, Lakey, Lent, Rabe, Ricks, Ruchti, Semmelroth, Taylor, VanOrden, Ward-Engelking, WoodwardNAYS – Adams, Bernt, Bjerke, Blaylock, Burtenshaw, Carlson, Galloway, Guthrie, Harris, Hart, Keyser, Kohl, Lenney, Nichols, Okuniewicz, Shippy, Toews, Zito, ZuiderveldAbsent and excused – WintrowFloor Sponsor - ForemanFiled in Office of the Secretary of Senate
